description: Curated YouTube video resources for modern CSS layout

videos.title: Learn CSS Grid the easy way
videos.creator: Kevin Powell
videos.description: Complete CSS Grid tutorial covering display grid, gap, column definitions, spanning, grid-template-areas, and responsive patterns.

videos.title: Learn flexbox the easy way
videos.creator: Kevin Powell
videos.description: Comprehensive Flexbox tutorial covering display flex, flex-grow, flex-direction, justify-content, align-items, and practical layout patterns.

videos.title: Flexbox or grid - How to decide?
videos.creator: Kevin Powell
videos.description: Compares Flexbox and Grid with clear guidelines on when to use each layout method with practical decision-making criteria.

videos.title: A new approach to container and wrapper classes
videos.creator: Kevin Powell
videos.description: Modern approach to containers using CSS grid for breakout layouts, eliminating traditional wrapper divs with intrinsic design patterns.

videos.title: Smart Layout Patterns with Modern CSS with KEVIN POWELL
videos.creator: Smashing Magazine
videos.description: Kevin Powell's SmashingConf talk on modern layout patterns using intrinsic design, container queries, subgrid, and style queries.
